info.name: Studium Backend Verification
info.description:
Runner-safe Postman collection for end-to-end backend verification through the gateway only.

Notes:
- All requests use {{baseUrl}} and never call downstream service ports directly.
- Setup folder logs in seeded users first and validates their tokens through /api/profile/me.
- Admin-only management flows use {{adminAccessToken}}.
- Dependent requests skip themselves when required variables are missing, so the runner does not fall through to /null or /undefined URLs.
- Optional requests are guarded and skipped by default unless their prerequisites or toggles are present.

exec: const utcDay = new Date(Date.UTC(now.getUTCFullYear(), now.getUTCMonth(), now.getUTCDate()));
